methodology.step_1: Identified 224 posts missing featured images from Phase 19 audit
methodology.step_2: For each post, generated search query from title keywords
methodology.step_3: Queried Pexels API with orientation=landscape for optimal display
methodology.step_4: Downloaded highest-quality match and uploaded to WordPress media library
methodology.step_5: Set as featured_media on each post via WordPress REST API
methodology.retry: 2 posts failed on first pass, retried successfully

impact.social_sharing: All posts now have og:image for social media preview cards
impact.serp_appearance: Google may show image thumbnails in search results for all posts
impact.visual_quality: High-quality landscape images from professional photographers
impact.brand_consistency: Consistent visual presentation across all 460 posts
